network_summary: Three Chicagoland GP locations all registered in NPPES under the legal name 'DENTAL PROFESSIONALS OF ILLINOIS, P.C.' (or close variant) — the documented friendly-PC wrapper used by Heartland Dental LLC across its Illinois-supported offices. Hillary Thull is the NPPES Authorized Official, consistent with a Heartland corporate credentialing/administrative staff role rather than a dentist owner. Two locations (Oak Park, Countryside) already carry dso_national / Heartland Dental classification in the DB. The Countryside Dental Group website (countrysidedental.com) explicitly discloses 'supported by Heartland Dental LLC' and 'Orahh Care Dental Community is a brand owned by Heartland Dental LLC' and 'dental practice operates as Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' The Oak Park location (Lifetime Smiles Dental) is confirmed Heartland/Orahh Care on whoownsmydentists.com. The Bloomingdale location (Flex Dental) shares the same NPPES legal entity and EIN (362736573, a known Heartland friendly-PC EIN), and while no explicit Heartland web disclosure was surfaced for that brand, the legal entity identity and AO match place it firmly within the same structure. Heartland Dental is PE-backed (KKR / Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan). This is a branded_dso cluster, not a dentist-owned multi.
owner_operator_identity: Heartland Dental LLC (DSO/MSO operator); Hillary Thull is the NPPES Authorized Official — consistent with a Heartland corporate credentialing or administrative coordinator role, not the dentist owner. Consumer brands: Flex Dental (Bloomingdale), Lifetime Smiles Dental (Oak Park), Countryside Dental Group (Countryside). All operate as Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.

mso_platform_pe_evidence: Heartland Dental LLC is a national DSO providing management and administrative support services to Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C. offices. Documentary disclosure at countrysidedental.com: 'This office is supported by Heartland Dental LLC, a dental support organization that provides administrative and business support services.' Orahh Care is confirmed as a brand owned by Heartland Dental LLC. Heartland Dental is PE-backed by KKR (majority investor) and Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan. See: https://countrysidedental.com/ and https://whoownsmydentists.com/location/lifetime-smiles-dental-oak-park-il
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Hillary Thull's AO role across these three NPIs is consistent with a Heartland corporate administrative/credentialing staff function — NOT a dentist owner running a private multi-office group. The AO reach is structural to Heartland's operating model (one AO per batch of supported PCs), not a personal ownership signal. All three locations are operating as of 2026 (Yelp/web presence confirmed for Countryside and Flex Dental). No stale/closed concerns identified.
evidence_chain: AO signal: Hillary Thull listed as NPPES Authorized Official on 3 NPPES org NPIs (1346997020 Bloomingdale, 1376254920 Oak Park, 1598427189 Countryside) across 3 ZIPs, all registered as 'DENTAL PROFESSIONALS OF ILLINOIS, P.C.' — a name-chain signal and known Heartland friendly-PC brand. Documentary corroboration: (1) countrysidedental.com website footer explicitly states 'supported by Heartland Dental LLC' and 'Orahh Care Dental Community is a brand owned by Heartland Dental LLC' and 'dental practice operates as Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.'; (2) whoownsmydentists.com page for Lifetime Smiles Dental Oak Park confirms Heartland Dental DSO affiliation; (3) DB classification already correctly marks Oak Park and Countryside as dso_national / Heartland Dental; (4) Bloomingdale shares the legal entity name and EIN with the established Heartland cluster.
future_app_notes: The Bloomingdale location (Flex Dental, NPI 1346997020) should be promoted to dso_national / affiliated_dso: Heartland Dental to match the other two. It is currently classified dso_regional (weaker signal) but the evidence is equivalent. The EIN 362736573 should be added to the known Heartland EIN list. Consider whether Hillary Thull appears as AO on additional IL Heartland-supported NPIs beyond these 3 — if so, the reach is under-counted. The Orahh Care brand should be tracked as a Heartland consumer brand alongside Lifetime Smiles, Countryside Dental Group, and Flex Dental.
